channel.title: Guide on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on The Gamer's Hollow

item.title: Running Windows on a Chromebook
item.description: A guide to installing windows on a Lenove 100e gen2 ast chromebook (for archive purposes) What you need A Lenovo 100e/300e gen2 ast Chromebook. A sd card or usb drive. A mouse (wired, or dongle only). Power adapter for the chromebook. Ventoy downloaded for your OS Drivers downloaded from this guide. Tiny11 iso downloaded from this guide. Downloads Tiny 11 ISO Ventoy Visual C++ Redist CR50 TPM Driver Chrome EC Driver Radeon GPU Drivers !

item.title: A Dummies Guide to Jailbreaking Your Wii U
item.description: What You Need A Wii U with the latest firmware installed (The Wii U can be from any region) An SD card or microSD card with an adapter A computer to copy files to the SD card An internet connection setup on your Wii U Setting up The SD Card Plug the SD card into your computer and format it to FAT-32 a guide on how to do that can be found HERE.
